name: Frosted Glass Geneva Globe Chandelier Brass (Includes LED Light bulb) - Threshold™: Adjustable Height, ETL Listed
description:
Add a dash of glowing appeal to your indoor space with this Frosted Glass Geneva Globe Chandelier from Threshold™. Crafted from solid metal with a glossy brass finish, this chandelier showcases a sleek body with 6 frosted glass geneva globes attached to the arms to create a focal point in your space, while adding the perfect amount of light to your space. Plus, the included dimmable LED bulbs allow you to customize lighting ambiance and mood. Whether hung in the living room or above a dining table, this chandelier makes the perfect choice to beautifully illuminate any space.

Overall Height of Lamp: 18.25 inches
Overall Width of Lamp (Diagonal): 22.25 inches
Height of Stem: Adjustable
Diagonal Length Between Bottom Lights: 22.25 inches
Diameter of Mounting Plate: 5.0 inches
Height of Mounting Plate: 1.0 inches
Diameter of Glass Shade: 4.0 inches
